Description: Note: I think time of dat and month are correlated because we went out at high tide every month, which changes the time of day we left. In each model I test which to use by comparing AIC scores
D - Destroyed, E - EMR (replanted), L - Natural
Visibility of video. Not a variable but a correction
Description of weather events: Sunny, Cloudy, Rainy
Tide height at beginning of recording. From Fishing Points App. I think this is more accurate than the on-site depth measurements we took
